summary: Comprehensive testing of multi-step checkout system completed. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend checkout flow fully functional with 3-step navigation, postcode-based delivery fee calculation, and click & collect option.

minor.issue: Endpoint does not require authentication - potential security concern for admin settings

issues: Header shows 'Free Delivery Over £299' but checkout settings have £500 threshold - inconsistent messaging

evidence: Admin login with admin@test.com / Admin@2026 successful
Page loads with 5 tabs: Delivery & Zones, Click & Collect, Time Slots, Checkout Text, Preview
All tabs navigable and functional
Save Settings button present
Delivery zones displayed with correct fees
Returns 200 with settings object containing delivery, collection, time_slots, text sections
Successfully saves settings
Settings persist and are retrievable via GET
Returns 200 with full settings
No authentication required
Contains delivery zones, collection stores, text config
Creates order successfully with order_id and order_number
Validates required customer fields (email, firstName, lastName)
Rejects empty items with 400 error
Calculates delivery fee server-side based on postcode zones
TN postcode returns £29.99 delivery fee (Local zone)
SE postcode returns £49.99 delivery fee (Greater London zone)
Unknown postcodes return £79.99 default fee
Orders over £500 get free delivery
Threshold configurable in admin settings
Click & Collect shows £0 delivery fee
Collection store displayed: Tile Station - Tonbridge
Order summary shows 'FREE' for delivery
Shows 'Your basket is empty' message
Browse Tiles button present
Form fields: Email, First Name, Last Name, Phone
Continue button navigates to Step 2
Validation works for required fields
Home Delivery and Click & Collect options displayed
Delivery address form shown when Home Delivery selected
Postcode-based fee calculation works in real-time
Collection store shown when Click & Collect selected
Payment placeholder displayed (MOCKED - no real Stripe integration)
Order review shows customer details and delivery address
Place Order button with total amount
Shows cart items with quantity controls
Subtotal calculated correctly
Delivery fee displayed (or 'Calculated at next step')
Total calculated correctly
Free delivery threshold message shown

action_items: Consider adding authentication to POST /api/website-admin/checkout-settings endpoint
Fix inconsistency: Header shows 'Free Delivery Over £299' but checkout settings have £500 threshold
critical_code_review_comments: Checkout settings API correctly uses deep_merge to prevent partial data loss on save
Guest checkout endpoint properly recalculates delivery fee server-side for security
Frontend correctly reads cart from localStorage key 'tile_cart'
Payment integration is MOCKED - placeholder UI only, no real Stripe processing
seed_data_creation: Test orders created via guest checkout API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Checkout system fully functional. Admin settings at /admin/checkout-settings with 5 tabs. Customer checkout at /shop/tile-checkout reads cart from localStorage 'tile_cart'. Delivery zones: Local (TN,ME,BR,DA) £29.99, Greater London (E,EC,N,NW,SE,SW,W,WC) £49.99, South East £59.99, Rest of UK £79.99. Free delivery over £500. Click & Collect shows £0 delivery. Payment is MOCKED placeholder only.

mocked_apis.payment_processing: Payment integration in Step 3 is a placeholder UI - no real Stripe/payment processing
